description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On September 25, 2025 at 10:42 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a 
collision involving an SUV on W. 3rd Street at Witmer Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was stopped facing southeast in the second to the right lane on W. 3rd Street in a queue of traffic for a red light at the 
intersection with Witmer Street. The traffic light turned green and the Waymo AV began to proceed with traffic. An SUV that was initially 
stopped behind the Waymo AV proceeded forward and the front of the SUV made contact with the rear of the Waymo AV. At the time of 
the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The SUV sustained damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
